---
title: "Supplementary PCoA skin and liver"
author: "Capucine LE CAM LIGIER"
date: "2024-04-01"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

# I. Load Required Packages

```{r global-options, include=FALSE}
# Global chunk settings
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, echo=FALSE)
```

```{r }
# Load required packages
packages <- c(
  "dada2", "phyloseq", "readr", "Biostrings", "DECIPHER", "ape", "ShortRead",
  "tidyverse", "vegan", "microbiome", "BiocManager", "ggplot2", "dplyr",
  "tidyr", "knitr", "rmarkdown", "readxl", "patchwork", "viridis", "here", "grid", "VennDiagram"
)
lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE)
```

# II. Load Data

```{r}
# Load phyloseq object
physeq <- readRDS(here("data", "physeq.rds"))
```

# III. Venn Diagram (ASV Overlap)

```{r}
# Subset by tissue type
GUT   <- subset_samples(physeq, type == "gut")
SKIN  <- subset_samples(physeq, type == "skin")
LIVER <- subset_samples(physeq, type == "liver")

# Helper function to extract present ASVs
get_present_asvs <- function(physeq_obj) {
  otu <- otu_table(physeq_obj)
  if (taxa_are_rows(otu)) rownames(otu)[rowSums(otu) > 0] else colnames(otu)[colSums(otu) > 0]
}

# Get ASVs for each tissue type
asvs_skin  <- get_present_asvs(SKIN)
asvs_gut   <- get_present_asvs(GUT)
asvs_liver <- get_present_asvs(LIVER)

# Create ASV list
asv_list <- list(SKIN = asvs_skin, GUT = asvs_gut, LIVER = asvs_liver)

# Total number of unique ASVs
total_unique_asvs <- length(unique(c(asvs_skin, asvs_gut, asvs_liver)))

# Compute intersections and unique sets
skin_only   <- setdiff(asvs_skin, union(asvs_gut, asvs_liver))
gut_only    <- setdiff(asvs_gut, union(asvs_skin, asvs_liver))
liver_only  <- setdiff(asvs_liver, union(asvs_skin, asvs_gut))

skin_gut    <- intersect(asvs_skin, asvs_gut)
skin_liver  <- intersect(asvs_skin, asvs_liver)
gut_liver   <- intersect(asvs_gut, asvs_liver)
common_all  <- Reduce(intersect, list(asvs_skin, asvs_gut, asvs_liver))
```

```{r}
# Create base Venn diagram
venn_plot <- venn.diagram(
  x = asv_list,
  filename = NULL,
  fill = c("#FF6F61", "#6BAED6", "#88B04B"),
  alpha = 0.5,
  cex = 1.5,
  cat.cex = 1.3,
  cat.dist = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.08),
  fontfamily = "Arial",
  cat.fontfamily = "Arial",
  cat.col = c("#FF6F61", "#6BAED6", "#88B04B"),
  margin = 0.1
)

# Function to convert count to % label
percent <- function(x) paste0(round(100 * length(x) / total_unique_asvs, 1), "%")

# Save Venn with labels as a TIFF
tiff(here::here("outputs", "FigS3.tiff"), width = 2000, height = 2000, res = 300)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(venn_plot)

label_venn <- function(text, x, y) {
  grid.text(text, x = x, y = y, gp = gpar(fontfamily = "Arial", fontsize = 12))
}

# Add percentage labels
label_venn(paste0("Total: ", total_unique_asvs, " ASVs"), x = 0.5, y = 0.95)
label_venn(percent(skin_only),   x = 0.23, y = 0.64)
label_venn(percent(gut_only),    x = 0.77, y = 0.64)
label_venn(percent(liver_only),  x = 0.50, y = 0.28)
label_venn(percent(skin_gut),    x = 0.50, y = 0.72)
label_venn(percent(skin_liver),  x = 0.36, y = 0.43)
label_venn(percent(gut_liver),   x = 0.64, y = 0.43)
label_venn(percent(common_all),  x = 0.50, y = 0.52)

dev.off()
```

# IV. Normalize and Filter Data

```{r}
# Rarefy to equal depth
physeq_rar <- rarefy_even_depth(physeq, sample.size = 13000)

# Relative abundance transformation
physeq_rar_relab <- transform_sample_counts(physeq_rar, function(x) x / sum(x))

# Filter taxa with relative abundance ≥ 0.1%
physeq_rar_filter <- filter_taxa(physeq_rar_relab, function(x) sum(x) >= 0.001, TRUE)

# Aggregate at Family level
physeq_fam <- tax_glom(physeq_rar_filter, taxrank = "Family", NArm = FALSE)
```

# V. Skin PCoA

```{r}
# Subset for skin samples
SKIN <- subset_samples(physeq_fam, type == "skin")
Fam_skin <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(SKIN) > 0.3, SKIN)
Fam_skin <- subset_samples(Fam_skin, !is.na(sample_data(Fam_skin)$migrant_pattern))
sample_data(Fam_skin)$migrant_pattern <- factor(as.character(sample_data(Fam_skin)$migrant_pattern))
ordination_skin <- ordinate(Fam_skin, "MDS", distance = "bray")
```

```{r}
# PCoA: by sample, colored by family
fish_skin <- plot_ordination(Fam_skin, ordination_skin, type = "samples", color = "family") +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "magma", name = "Family") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Fish families")) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic")
  )
```

```{r}
# PCoA: by taxa
taxa_skin <- plot_ordination(Fam_skin, ordination_skin, color = "Family", type = "taxa") +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Taxa")) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic")
  )
```

```{r}
# PCoA: by trophic level and migration pattern
trait_skin <- plot_ordination(Fam_skin, ordination_skin, color = "trophic_level", shape = "migrant_pattern") +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "Trophic Position") +
  labs(shape = "Migration Pattern") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )
```

```{r}
# Combine skin PCoA panels
FigS1 <- trait_skin / fish_skin / taxa_skin +
  plot_layout(ncol = 1, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") & theme(legend.position = "right")

ggsave(
  filename = here::here("outputs", "FigS1.tiff"),
  plot = FigS1,
  dpi = 300, width = 11, height = 9, units = "in", device = "tiff"
)
```

# VI. Liver PCoA

```{r}
# Subset for liver samples
LIVER <- subset_samples(physeq_fam, type == "liver")
Fam_liver <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(LIVER) > 0.3, LIVER)
Fam_liver <- subset_samples(Fam_liver, !is.na(sample_data(Fam_liver)$migrant_pattern))
sample_data(Fam_liver)$migrant_pattern <- factor(as.character(sample_data(Fam_liver)$migrant_pattern))
ordination_liver <- ordinate(Fam_liver, "MDS", distance = "bray")
```

```{r}
# Sample-based PCoA
fish_liver <- plot_ordination(Fam_liver, ordination_liver, type = "samples", color = "family") +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "magma", name = "Family") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Fish families")) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic")
  )
```

```{r}
# Taxa-based PCoA
taxa_liver <- plot_ordination(Fam_liver, ordination_liver, color = "Family", type = "taxa") +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Taxa")) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic")
  )
```

```{r}
# Trait-based PCoA
trait_liver <- plot_ordination(Fam_liver, ordination_liver, color = "trophic_level", shape = "migrant_pattern") +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "Trophic Position") +
  labs(shape = "Migration Pattern") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )
```

```{r}
# Combine liver PCoA panels
FigS2 <- trait_liver / fish_liver / taxa_liver +
  plot_layout(ncol = 1, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") & theme(legend.position = "right")

ggsave(
  filename = here::here("outputs", "FigS2.tiff"),
  plot = FigS2,
  dpi = 300, width = 11, height = 9, units = "in", device = "tiff"
)
```
